  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Call Center Executive",
  "description": "Skipper Eye-Q Super Speciality Eye Hospital is an International Eye Hospital chain with the presence of 30 in India and 4 in Nigeria, handling all types of Eye Surgeries such as Cataract, Retina, Glaucoma, presbyopia, cornea, squint, refractive error, and other vision problems, and having treated 10+ million patients. Our patients get the same treatment in Nigeria as in the US, UK, and India. We are 18 Years in Eye Care and HMO Empanelled Hospitals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Call Center Executive
Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	A Call Center Executive will serve as the crucial first point of contact for patients, managing high-volume, empathetic communication, scheduling specialized appointments, and handling patient inquiries about eye care services.
	They ensure efficient patient flow and maintain accurate, confidential, and up-to-date patient records.


Key Responsibilities


	Appointment Management: Scheduling, rescheduling, confirming, and managing patient appointments, often using Electronic Medical Record (EMR) or specialized hospital software.
	Patient Interaction &amp; Support: Answering inbound calls and emails to provide information about eye care services, procedures, and doctor schedules.
	Customer Experience &amp; Satisfaction: Handling complaints, de-escalating patient concerns, and conducting patient experience surveys.
	Data Accuracy &amp; Documentation: Accurately recording patient details, inquiries, and complaints into the system.
	Administrative Tasks: Verifying patient demographics, insurance information, and preparing correspondence.
	Clinical Coordination: Collaborating with optometrists, ophthalmologists, and other clinical staff to ensure seamless patient care.
	Follow-Up: Making outbound calls to patients to check on their well-being and satisfaction with services.


Key Requirements


	Education: A Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Social Sciences, Humanities, or Health Information Management is generally required.
	Experience: A minimum of 2-5 years of experience in a similar role is typically required, with experience in a healthcare or medical call center setting being a major advantage.
	Communication Skills: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills in English are essential, with fluency in local languages (e.g., Yoruba, Igbo, Hausa) often required.
	Technical Proficiency: Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), and familiarity with EMR/hospital software.
	Soft Skills: High level of empathy, patience, ability to work under pressure, attention to detail, and a customer-centric approach.
	Knowledge: Basic understanding of medical or eye care terminology is highly beneficial.
	Compliance: Understanding of patient confidentiality and data protection regulations.


Key Competencies:


	Multitasking: Ability to manage high-volume calls while navigating systems.
	Problem-Solving: Quick identification of patient issues and resolution.
	Empathy: Ability to remain professional, calm, and supportive to patients, many of whom may be distressed due to vision issues.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send an updated CV to:&nbsp;skippereyeqhospitals@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "description": "Suacasa Nigeria Limited is property developer focused on building design-led properties. We build innovative and design-led schemes in a number of locations across Nigeria. We have continued to gain an outstanding reputation as one of Nigeria&rsquo;s foremost developers specializing in luxury refurbishments.&nbsp;We create contemporary, luxurious homes of exceptional design and specification. Our properties combine are a rich blend of creativity, intelligent design philosophy, exceptional attention to detail and eco-friendliness. As we work alongside leading consultants, interior designers and product suppliers, we enable the progression and development of meticulously thought-out schemes from the very start.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Engineer &ndash; (Structural &amp; Site)

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Structural &amp; Site Engineer will play a dual role in both the design and on-site execution of real estate development projects.
	The role involves preparing and reviewing structural designs, ensuring compliance with engineering standards, and overseeing daily site activities to guarantee that construction works are delivered safely, on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards.
	The ideal candidate must be able to seamlessly bridge design intent with practical site implementation.


Key Responsibilities
Structural Engineering Duties:


	Develop structural designs, calculations, and detailed drawings for residential and commercial projects.
	Review architectural drawings and ensure structural feasibility and integrity.
	Conduct structural analysis and ensure compliance with local and international codes.
	Provide technical guidance on materials, load calculations, and construction methods.
	Review and approve contractor/shop drawings.


Site Engineering Duties:


	Supervise and coordinate on-site construction activities.
	Ensure projects are executed according to approved drawings and specifications.
	Monitor project progress and prepare site reports.
	Manage subcontractors, artisans, and site workers.
	Ensure adherence to health, safety, and environmental standards.
	Conduct quality control inspections and resolve site challenges.
	Liaise with consultants, contractors, and project stakeholders.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Accuracy and timeliness of structural designs and documentation
	Percentage of projects delivered within budget and timeline
	Reduction in structural design errors and site rework
	Compliance with safety standards (zero or minimal site incidents)
	Quality of construction work (measured by defect rate)
	Efficiency in resolving site issues
	Timeliness and accuracy of site reports
	Client and stakeholder satisfaction levels


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Civil Engineering or Structural Engineering
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in real estate/construction
	COREN registration or NSE membership is an added advantage
	Proven experience in both structural design and site supervision


Core Competencies:


	Strong knowledge of structural design principles and construction methodologies
	Proficiency in engineering software (e.g., AutoCAD, ETABS, SAFE, SAP2000)
	Project management and site supervision skills
	Problem-solving and analytical thinking
	Attention to detail and quality control
	Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines
	Knowledge of Nigerian building regulations and standards


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letters, CVs, and Portfolio to:&nbsp;sochima@suacasang.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

	Act as a strategic partner to the MD, supporting decision-making through research, analysis, and insights
